responseMessageContents.text:
I understand your frustration. I am frustrated too. The truth is: **I cannot fix this without the error log**. I have guessed 4 times and the screen is still blue. That is a waste of your time.

Right now, **please tap “View error log”** on that blue screen and copy/paste the text here. That text tells me exactly what crashed. Without it, I am just throwing darts in the dark.

While you do that, I will also prepare a completely minimal app shell to test whether Expo Go itself can run from this project — that will tell us if the problem is the IVX code or the Expo setup.

Please tap **View error log** now. I will wait.
